description: AI Workload Capacity Planning Dashboard - Comprehensive GPU/MIG monitoring with memory, compute, and workload analysis

panels.description: Total count of GPU devices and MIG instances
panels.title: Total Devices

panels.description: Count of whole GPU devices (non-MIG)
panels.title: Whole GPUs

panels.description: Count of MIG instances
panels.title: MIG Instances

panels.description: Count of active GPU deployments
panels.title: Active Workloads

panels.description: Average composite load across all devices (60% compute + 40% memory)

targets.expr:
avg(
  sum by (gpu, GPU_I_ID, UUID) (
    (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE * 100 * 0.60)
    +
    ((DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED / (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE) * 100) * 0.40)
  )
)

panels.title: Avg Device Load

panels.description: Devices with memory utilization over 85%
panels.title: Memory Saturated (>85%)

panels.description: Devices with less than 20% composite load

targets.expr:
count(
  sum by (gpu, GPU_I_ID, UUID) (
    (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE * 100 * 0.60)
    +
    ((DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED / (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE) * 100) * 0.40)
  ) < 20
) or vector(0)

panels.title: Underutilized (<20%)

panels.title: Total Memory Capacity

panels.title: Memory In Use

panels.title: Avg Memory Utilization

panels.title: OOM Risk %

panels.title: Avg Temperature

panels.title: Memory Utilization % by Device

panels.title: Memory by Namespace

panels.description: Memory used by workloads over time
panels.title: Workload Memory Over Time

panels.description: Composite load (60% compute + 40% memory) per GPU/MIG device

targets.expr:
sum by (gpu, GPU_I_ID, GPU_I_PROFILE, Hostname, modelName, UUID) (
  (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE * 100 * 0.60)
  +
  ((DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED / (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE) * 100) * 0.40)
)

panels.title: Device Composite Load

panels.description: Top 10 devices by composite load over time

targets.expr:
topk(10,
  sum by (gpu, GPU_I_ID, GPU_I_PROFILE, Hostname, modelName, UUID) (
    (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE * 100 * 0.60)
    +
    ((DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED / (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE) * 100) * 0.40)
  )
)

panels.title: Top 10 Devices by Load

panels.description: Graphics engine activity (compute) per device
panels.title: Compute % by Device

panels.description: Detailed workload GPU usage table
panels.title: Workload GPU Usage

panels.description: GPU load over time per workload

targets.expr:
sum by (exported_pod, exported_namespace, gpu, GPU_I_ID, GPU_I_PROFILE, Hostname, UUID) (
  (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE{exported_pod!=""} * 100 * 0.60)
  +
  ((DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{exported_pod!=""} / (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{exported_pod!=""} + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{exported_pod!=""}) * 100) * 0.40)
)

panels.title: Workload GPU Load Over Time

panels.description: Memory utilization by Kubernetes deployment

targets.expr:
sum by (deployment, exported_namespace) (
  DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE{exported_pod!=""} * 100
* on(exported_pod, exported_namespace) group_left(deployment)
label_replace(
  label_replace(
    label_replace(
      kube_pod_owner{owner_kind="ReplicaSet"},
      "deployment", "$1", "owner_name", "(.+)-[^-]+"
    ),
    "exported_pod", "$1", "pod", "(.+)"
  ),
  "exported_namespace", "$1", "namespace", "(.+)"
)
)

sum by (deployment, exported_namespace) (
  (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{exported_pod!=""} / (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{exported_pod!=""} + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{exported_pod!=""}) * 100)
* on(exported_pod, exported_namespace) group_left(deployment)
label_replace(
  label_replace(
    label_replace(
      kube_pod_owner{owner_kind="ReplicaSet"},
      "deployment", "$1", "owner_name", "(.+)-[^-]+"
    ),
    "exported_pod", "$1", "pod", "(.+)"
  ),
  "exported_namespace", "$1", "namespace", "(.+)"
)
)

panels.title: GPU Usage by Deployment

panels.description: Comprehensive device status table

targets.expr:
sum by (gpu, GPU_I_ID, GPU_I_PROFILE, Hostname, modelName, UUID) (
  (DCGM_FI_PROF_GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE * 100 * 0.60)
  +
  ((DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED / (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE) * 100) * 0.40)
)
avg by (gpu, GPU_I_ID, Hostname, UUID) ((DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE) / 1024)
